title: Hungry Like the Wolf
why_this_song: Hungry Like the Wolf by Duran Duran (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'm on the hunt I'm after you
Smell like I sound, I'm lost in a crowd
And I'm hungry like the wolf
Straddle the line in discord and rhyme
Mouth is alive, all running inside
And I'm hungry like the wolf
Burning the ground, I break from the crowd

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dodo" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dodo" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hunt" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hunt" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Darken the city, night is a wire
Stalked in the forest, too close to hide
And I'm hungry like the wolf

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Steam in the subway, earth is a afire
Strut on a line, it's discord and rhyme
I'm on the hunt, I'm after you

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Hungry Like the Wolf" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Hungry Like the Wolf" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Hungry Like the Wolf" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Hungry Like the Wolf" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Hungry Like the Wolf" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Hungry Like the Wolf"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
